name: Palace of Slaanesh
description:
The palace of the Prince of Pleasure themselves.

Tried to make it lore accurate, but I leaned in a lot more on the pleasure and sex aspect. Doesn't mean other aspects of Slaanesh don't show up.

This is a purely randomized scenario, I do not know what you will find. So don't come crying over disturbing things, a quick refresh will give you something completely different.

Should probably work for if you're a 40K, Fantasy or AOS fan. Though the bot has mentioned Nagash, Tzeentch and Skaven out of nowhere which surprised me. Like I didn't even tell the bot this was Warhammer or anything about other gods.

Teratophilia and other such things warning
creator: Horny Horror
